differential_diagnoses: Insulin-receptor antibody syndrome (Type B insulin resistance)
Type A insulin resistance syndrome (mutations in INSR gene)
next_steps: Repeat serum glucose and insulin levels, including serum insulin binding and recovery
Perform genetic testing for lipodystrophy-associated mutations (e.g., AGPAT2, BSCL2, CAV1, PTRF)
Consult endocrinology and immunology for evaluation of autoimmune disease overlap
Continue supportive glycemic management with frequent monitoring for rebound hypoglycemia
Assess for potential severe autoimmune complications or underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
